name: AIGO-X Browser Agent
description: Enterprise AI & SaaS security monitoring. Lightweight, tamper-resistant, cross-browser. Managed by your organisation's AIGO-X GRC Platform.
_note_firefox: For Firefox, rename this file to manifest-firefox.json and change 'service_worker' to 'scripts': ['background.js']. Firefox supports MV3 from v109+.
_note_safari: Safari Web Extension: run 'xcrun safari-web-extension-converter .' in Terminal. Requires Xcode 14+ and Apple Developer account. Supports macOS 12+ and iOS 15+.
_note_edge: Edge uses this exact manifest. Deploy via Microsoft Intune or Edge Management Service — identical to Chrome enterprise policy.
_enterprise_note: To prevent users from disabling this extension, deploy via managed browser policy. See deployment/ directory for templates: Chrome GPO, Firefox enterprise policy, Edge Intune, iOS MDM (.mobileconfig), Android Intune XML.
